spec.postcondition: (result >= 0 && (result == 0 || result > 0) && (result == 0 implies the calling process is not attached to nd or has no open references) && (result > 0 implies the calling process is attached to nd with result open references)) && ((npid_find_process_slot(nd) == -1) ? (result == 0) : (result == nd->attached_processes[npid_find_process_slot(nd)].open_count))
